title: Part 2 – Question-Réponse : le déjeuner d'équipe
instructions: Écoutez la question et les trois réponses possibles. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.
audioText: Should we book a table for the team lunch or just walk in? (A) I'd recommend booking — it gets busy at noon. (B) Lunch is served from noon to two. (C) The team is in the meeting room.

choices: I'd recommend booking — it gets busy at noon.
Lunch is served from noon to two.
The team is in the meeting room.
questions.explanation: Question ouverte sur une décision. (A) donne une recommandation justifiée. (B) informe des horaires sans trancher, (C) est hors sujet.
